actual_tool_functionality: Premium and input-driven: uses the entered video topic plus video format, tag strategy, audience fit, metadata match, and count to shape generated tag groups.
output_depth_and_sections: Not generic or thin: output is organized into Primary Topic Tags, Supporting Context Tags, Alternate/Misspelling Tags, Audience/Format Tags, and Avoid/Review Notes with per-tag rationale.
controls_affect_output: Meaningful controls: format changes format-paired tags, strategy changes alternate/long-tail depth, audience affects audience-specific tags, metadata match affects metadata-alignment tags, and count changes section size.
seo_helpful_content_faqs: SEO/content is specific to YouTube upload tags, title/thumbnail/description/spoken-content alignment, alternate spellings, and relevance-first review. FAQs are specific and not generic.
safety_adsense_adx_status: Passes: clear YouTube/Google non-affiliation, no ranking/visibility/views/recommendations/subscribers/monetization/engagement guarantees, and anti-spam/relevance-first warnings against stuffing, misleading topics, unrelated trends, impersonation, and unsupported tags.
exact_approval_reason_or_blocker: Approved because the tool now behaves like a YouTube-specific upload tag review assistant rather than a generic tag list generator, while retaining strong no-guarantee and anti-spam safeguards.
